title: Authorization
doc_html:
§1228.7.  Authorization

The policy board is authorized to receive or accept grants, donations, contributions, or appropriations from public or private sources and is further authorized to expend any funds made available from these sources to carry out the purpose of the policy board.

Acts 1999, No. 864, §1.

§1228.7.  Authorization
The policy board is authorized to receive or accept grants, donations, contributions, or appropriations from public or private sources and is further authorized to expend any funds made available from these sources to carry out the purpose of the policy board.
Acts 1999, No. 864, §1.
